text_excerpt: News | Bernard Jenkin MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home News Campaigns In Parliament About Bernard Contact People News Bernard's response to the Tendring District Council (TDC) Local Plan Review Wednesday, 25 March, 2026 This week I submitted a response to the Tendring District Council (TDC) Local Plan Review Regulation 18 consultation. The Local Plan must be driven by infrastructure deliverability. While communities across Tendring recognise the need for growth, the current infrastructure deficit cannot support the Government’s target of 1,063 homes per year without significant upfront investment.
